goal: Configure the sim IMU at /World/amr/base_link/imu_link to match Bosch BMI088 noise/bias and publish /imu/data at 200 Hz.
thoughts: BMI088 datasheet: gyro noise density 0.014 °/s/√Hz (convert to rad/s for Isaac: *π/180 ≈ 2.44e-4 rad/s/√Hz), bias stability ~2 °/hr (≈ 9.7e-6 rad/s). Accel: 175 µg/√Hz (*9.81e-6 ≈ 1.72e-3 m/s²/√Hz), bias 20 µg (≈ 1.96e-4 m/s²). 200 Hz matches EKF — higher wastes. Isaac Sim IMU is Gaussian white + random walk, no temperature drift.
code:
spec = lookup_product_spec(product="Bosch BMI088")

# Units: Isaac Sim IMU expects rad/s and m/s^2. CONVERT.
#   gyro_noise_density = 0.014 deg/s/sqrt(Hz) * pi/180 ≈ 2.44e-4 rad/s/sqrt(Hz)
#   gyro_bias_stability = 2 deg/hr ≈ 9.7e-6 rad/s
#   accel_noise_density = 175e-6 g/sqrt(Hz) * 9.81 ≈ 1.72e-3 m/s^2/sqrt(Hz)
#   accel_bias_stability = 20e-6 g * 9.81 ≈ 1.96e-4 m/s^2

add_sensor_to_prim(
    parent_prim_path="/World/amr/base_link/imu_link",
    sensor_type="imu",
    rate_hz=200,
    gyro_noise_density=2.44e-4,
    gyro_bias_stability=9.7e-6,
    accel_noise_density=1.72e-3,
    accel_bias_stability=1.96e-4,
    frame_id="imu_link"
)

ros2_publish(
    sensor_prim_path="/World/amr/base_link/imu_link",
    topic="/imu/data",
    msg_type="sensor_msgs/Imu",
    rate_hz=200,
    frame_id="imu_link"
)

inspect_camera(prim_path="/World/amr/base_link/imu_link")  # verify fields applied

# Honest limits: Isaac IMU is Gaussian white + bias random walk.
# No BMI088 temperature drift, no g-sensitive gyro error. sim-to-real gap.
failure_modes: Leaving bias_stability=0 — sim EKF trusts IMU too much vs real
Reporting noise in deg/s and mg — Isaac wants rad/s and m/s^2
Running 400 Hz IMU when EKF subscribes at 200 — pure waste + dropped samples
